summary.para: Get information about all cross-cluster replication follower indices. For example, the results include follower index names, leader index names, replication options, and whether the follower indices are active or paused.
A comma-delimited list of follower index patterns.

The period to wait for a connection to the master node. If the master node is not available before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error. It can also be set to -1 to indicate that the request should never timeout.
